zh.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine De Walden是John de Walton和Elizabeth Butler的女兒，於1394年出生在英國賀特福爾阿爾布瑞。她於1422年與Sir John Barley在英國賀特福爾阿爾布瑞結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1464年5月3日在英國英格蘭賀特福爾阿爾布瑞享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine De Walden是John de Walton和Elizabeth Butler的女儿，于1394年出生在英国賀特福爾阿爾布瑞。她于1422年与Sir John Barley在英国賀特福爾阿爾布瑞结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1464年5月3日在英国英格兰賀特福爾阿爾布瑞享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Walden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Kings Walden and Saint Pauls Walden (Hertfordshire), Saffron Waldon (Essex), Waldon in Milton Damerel (Devon), and Walden (North Yorkshire). The placenames derives from Old English walh ‘foreigner, Briton, serf’ (genitive plural wala) + denu ‘valley’.
German: patronymic from   Wald   3.
Americanized form of Norwegian   Wolden   or   Volden  .

variants.name: Wald
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Fritz, Arno, Gerhard, Guenther, Gunther, Hans, Inge, Ingeborg, Liesl, Markus, Mathias, Udo.
German and English: topographic name for someone who lived in or near a forest (Old High German wald, northern Middle English wald).

Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name from German Wald ‘forest’. Very few Jews would have been living anywhere near a forest at the time when they acquired surnames, so as a Jewish name its origins are unlikely to be topographic.

variants.name: Waldon
meanings: English: variant of   Walden  .

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Polish: variant of   Lada  .
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catheryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine De Walden was born in 1394, in Albury, Hertfordshire, England as the daughter of John de Walton and Elizabeth Butler. She married Sir John Barley in 1422, in Albury, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died on 3 May 1464, in Albury, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine De Walden est née en 1394, à Albury, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, fille de John de Walton et Elizabeth Butler. Elle a épousé Sir John Barley en 1422, à Albury, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée le 3 mai 1464, à Albury, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine De Walden wurde 1394 in Albury, Hertfordshire, England, als Tochter von John de Walton und Elizabeth Butler geboren. Sie hat 1422 in Albury, Hertfordshire, England Sir John Barley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 3. Mai 1464 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Albury, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine De Walden è nata il nel 1394 nel Albury, Hertfordshire, England come figlia di John de Walton e Elizabeth Butler. Lei sposato Sir John Barley nel 1422, nel Albury, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 3 maggio 1464, nel Albury, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine De Waldenは1394年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアルブリーでJohn de WaltonとElizabeth Butlerの娘として生まれた。1422年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアルブリーでSir John Barleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1464年5月3日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアルブリーで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine De Walden(은)는 1394년 영국 허트퍼드실르 알버이에서 John de Walton(와)과 Elizabeth Butler의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1422년 영국 허트퍼드실르 알버이에서 Sir John Barley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1464년 5월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 알버이에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine De Walden nasceu em 1394, em Albury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra filha de John de Walton e Elizabeth Butler. Ela casou-se com Sir John Barley em 1422, em Albury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 3 de maio de 1464, em Albury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine De Walden родилась в 1394 г. в местности албури, хиртфордшир, Англия. Её родителей звали John de Walton и Elizabeth Butler. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Barley в 1422 г. в местности албури, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла 3 мая 1464 г. в местности албури, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine De Walden nació en 1394, en Albury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra como hija de John de Walton y Elizabeth Butler. Se casó con Sir John Barley en 1422, en Albury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 3 de mayo de 1464, en Albury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años.
